title: MicroStation DGN Workflow Quick-Start Kit

star.situation: A civil or infrastructure CAD team needs DGN help, but seed files, levels, cells, references, and exports are not clearly governed.
star.task: Create a public-safe quickstart that names package readiness before conversion or automation spreads across DGN workflows.
star.action: Bundle approved GDAL DGN fixtures, validate seed/reference expectations, and show MicroStation DGN vocabulary through Python and .NET-style adapter examples.
star.result: Peers can run the package check, inspect export risk, and discuss the native MicroStation runtime boundary with concrete terms.

developmentPreviewWarning: This CAD library is in development. This is an early public preview for feedback on the best business case, workflow shape, and proof path.
publicBoundary: Public kit contains approved public fixtures, code examples, validation reports, and native adapter scaffolds only.
